language.title: Language
language.hint: More languages can be added later (i18n keys are ready).

map.title: Spot map
map.subtitle: Up to 50 spots visible on the map, nearest to farthest from the view center
map.geoDisabledMessage: Enable location to center the map on your position.
map.downloadNeedNetwork: You need an internet connection to download this area.
map.downloadZoneEmpty: No spots were returned for this view at this zoom level.
map.downloadZoneSuccessMessage: {{count}} spots saved for offline use (API radius ~ {{radius}} km).
map.syncZeroRowsHint: Sync finished but no spots were saved. Check RLS policies on spots (anonymous read), latitude/longitude or readable geometry, and that the table has rows.
map.localIndexHint: {{inView}} point(s) loaded for this view — {{total}} spots in local database.
map.localIndexEmpty: No spots in local database: connect once for the initial import.

offline.noCacheMessage: Connect once while online in this area to save spots for offline viewing.
offline.networkErrorNoCache: No cached data for this area or filter.

list.title: Spot list
list.subtitle: Sorted by distance (50 km radius)
list.permissionNeededMessage: Permission is required to sort by proximity.
list.genericError: Could not load the spot list.

addSpot.title: Add a spot
addSpot.subtitle: The spot will be created as unverified.
addSpot.name: Name
addSpot.missingFieldsMessage: Name, type, latitude and longitude are required.
addSpot.invalidCoordsMessage: Latitude and longitude must be numbers.
addSpot.successMessage: The spot was created as unverified.

profile.title: Profile & sign-in
profile.subtitle: Email OTP with Supabase
profile.otpPendingHint: After sending the code, the verification field will appear here.
profile.emailHint: A one-time code will be sent.
profile.otpSentMessage: Check your inbox and enter the OTP.
profile.otpHint: Enter the code from your email.
profile.sendFailedDatabaseHint: Account creation failed. Check that the `profiles` table and its insert trigger are configured correctly.
profile.missingCodeMessage: Enter the code you received by email.
